stories.title: The Quantum Garden
stories.author: Elena Rodriguez
stories.summary: A botanist discovers plants communicating through quantum entanglement.
stories.content: Dr. Sarah Chen had always known plants were more complex than they appeared. But when her experimental quantum sensors picked up structured data patterns from the garden's rose bushes, she realized she had stumbled upon something extraordinary. The plants weren't just alive—they were communicating...

stories.title: Echoes of Old Mumbai
stories.author: Arjun Patel
stories.summary: A young archivist discovers letters from 1947 that reveal a forbidden love story.
stories.content: The dusty basement of the Mumbai Archives held secrets waiting seventy years to be discovered. When Priya found the bundle of yellowed letters tied with a faded silk ribbon, she unraveled a love story that transcended borders...

stories.title: The Last Lighthouse Keeper
stories.author: Margaret O'Sullivan
stories.summary: On a remote Irish island, the last lighthouse keeper must solve a century-old mystery.
stories.content: The light had been burning for 147 years, and Thomas O'Brien was determined it wouldn't go out on his watch. But when strange symbols began appearing on the lighthouse walls during stormy nights, he realized there was more to this ancient tower...

stories.title: Digital Dystopia
stories.author: Kenji Tanaka
stories.summary: In a world where memories are currency, a memory dealer discovers her past is fabricated.
stories.content: Memory was the ultimate commodity in Neo-Tokyo of 2089. Yuki had made a fortune trading in other people's experiences, but when she stumbled upon a corrupted memory file with her own signature pattern, her entire reality began to unravel...
